PROJECT_TITLE: Open Door Shelter — 15 Year Story (TEST FIXTURE)

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: When we started in 2009, we had nothing but a church basement and a list of forty families who needed help.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Strong cold open — establishes origin, scale, and stakes in one breath.

segments.text: When we started in 2009, we had nothing but a church basement
and a list of forty families who needed help.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: I never imagined it would grow into what it is today. Honestly, I thought we'd last a year, maybe two.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Humility beat; pairs with the founding story.

segments.text: I never imagined it would grow into what it is today.
Honestly, I thought we'd last a year, maybe two.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: David Chen
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: I showed up to volunteer for one weekend. That was eight years ago.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Volunteer entry point; candidate but not yet in the cut.

segments.text: I showed up to volunteer for one weekend. That was eight years ago.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: Every family that walks through our doors gets a hot meal, a safe place to sleep, and someone who actually listens.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Mission in one line — the spine of Act 2.

segments.text: Every family that walks through our doors gets a hot meal, a safe place to sleep,
and someone who actually listens.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: David Chen
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: The hardest part isn't the long hours. It's seeing kids who've never had a bed of their own.

segments.text: The hardest part isn't the long hours.
It's seeing kids who've never had a bed of their own.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: We don't ask people how they ended up here. We ask them what they need next.

segments.text: We don't ask people how they ended up here.
We ask them what they need next.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: Last year we served over twelve thousand meals. But the number I care about is the families who never came back, because they didn't need to.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Impact + reframe of success. Act 3 anchor.

segments.text: Last year we served over twelve thousand meals.
But the number I care about is the families who never came back, because they didn't need to.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: David Chen
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: When a kid you helped comes back as a volunteer, that's when you know it worked.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Full-circle payoff; candidate, not yet in cut.

segments.text: When a kid you helped comes back as a volunteer, that's when you know it worked.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: We're not trying to be the biggest. We're trying to be the place that's still here when everyone else has gone home.

segments.text: We're not trying to be the biggest.
We're trying to be the place that's still here when everyone else has gone home.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: David Chen
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: I learned more about my own community in one year here than in the thirty before it.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Personal-growth beat; candidate, not yet in cut.

segments.text: I learned more about my own community in one year here than in the thirty before it.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: Maria Lopez
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: My grandmother used to feed anyone who knocked on her door. I guess this is just her kitchen, scaled up.
SOURCE_QUOTES.rationale: Warm origin texture; humanizes the founder.

segments.text: My grandmother used to feed anyone who knocked on her door.
I guess this is just her kitchen, scaled up.

SOURCE_QUOTES.speaker: David Chen
SOURCE_QUOTES.quote: Um, yeah, so, the parking situation has definitely improved since we repaved the lot last spring.

segments.text: Um, yeah, so, the parking situation has definitely improved since we repaved the lot last spring.

timeline.notes: Sets the year and scale before Maria continues.

timeline.speaker: Maria Lopez
timeline.notes: Trimmed the first sentence in a prior pass.
